summary: Phase 51 testing complete. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for: AM Account Managers page (3 AMs visible), Brand Financials with E-way Bill fields, Brand Orders with Invoice+E-way buttons, Brand Account with Factory Credit Section and Apply for Credit modal.
seed_data_creation: Created test invoices with e-way bill fields, credit applications for brand and factory
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 51 features fully tested: (1) AM mapping accepts factories - GET /api/admin/brands returns type=factory entities, (2) Invoice E-way Bill fields working - POST/PUT/GET all support eway_bill_number and eway_bill_url, (3) Brand orders enriched with invoice - GET /api/brand/orders includes invoice object with e-way fields, (4) Admin orders linked_invoice - GET /api/orders joins brand_invoices, (5) Factory credit summaries - GET /api/brand/factory-credit-summaries returns factory credit data with has_credit=false for Demo Factory A, (6) Credit application - POST /api/brand/credit-application works for brand and linked factories, returns 403/404 for unrelated factories, (7) Brand addresses include factory - GET /api/brand/addresses merges factory addresses with source='factory' and read_only=true. UI verified: AM page shows 3 AMs, Brand Financials has E-way Bill Number and URL fields in invoice form, Brand Orders shows Invoice+E-way buttons in DOCUMENTS column, Brand Account shows Factory Credit Section with 'Apply for credit' button for Demo Factory A.

features_verified.am_mapping_factories: PASS - GET /api/admin/brands returns type field, factories have parent_brand_id
features_verified.am_list_shows_factory_type: PASS - GET /api/admin/account-managers shows managed_brands with type field
features_verified.invoice_eway_bill_create: PASS - POST /api/admin/brands/{id}/invoices accepts eway_bill_number and eway_bill_url
features_verified.brand_orders_invoice: PASS - GET /api/brand/orders includes invoice object with eway fields
features_verified.admin_orders_linked_invoice: PASS - GET /api/orders joins brand_invoices into linked_invoice
features_verified.factory_credit_summaries: PASS - GET /api/brand/factory-credit-summaries returns factory credit data
features_verified.credit_application_unrelated_403: PASS - POST /api/brand/credit-application returns 403/404 for unrelated factory
features_verified.ui_am_page: PASS - Account Managers page shows 3 AMs with managed brands
features_verified.ui_brand_financials_eway: PASS - Invoice form has E-way Bill Number and URL fields
features_verified.ui_brand_orders_documents: PASS - Orders page shows DOCUMENTS column with Invoice+E-way buttons
features_verified.ui_factory_credit_section: PASS - Brand Account shows Linked Factories Credit section
features_verified.ui_apply_credit_modal: PASS - Apply for Credit modal opens with correct fields
